en-US.name: Flash Deck
en-US.summary: Voice flashcards with pictures for Echo Show
en-US.description: Study flashcards hands-free. Say a deck name, flip cards by voice or tap, grade yourself with 'got it' or 'missed it', and the skill schedules the cards you miss more often (spaced repetition). Also takes quick voice notes that become a reviewable deck — like post-its for your Echo Show.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask flash deck to quiz me on world capitals
Alexa, tell flash deck to note buy milk

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Personal-use skill. Open it, say 'study world capitals', flip and grade cards.
